D:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc libsmtclyrics_core.a CMakeFiles/smtclyrics_core.dir/src/app/Application.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/smtclyrics_core.dir/src/cache/Cache.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/smtclyrics_core.dir/src/config/Config.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/smtclyrics_core.dir/src/http/HttpClient.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/smtclyrics_core.dir/src/lyrics/LrcParser.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/smtclyrics_core.dir/src/lyrics/LyricRepository.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/smtclyrics_core.dir/src/lyrics/OnlineLyrics.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/smtclyrics_core.dir/src/smtc/SmtcProvider.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/smtclyrics_core.dir/src/ui/ControlWindow.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/smtclyrics_core.dir/src/ui/DesktopLyricsWindow.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/smtclyrics_core.dir/src/util/Base64.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/smtclyrics_core.dir/src/util/Encoding.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/smtclyrics_core.dir/src/util/Inflate.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/smtclyrics_core.dir/src/util/Path.cpp.obj
D:\mingw64\bin\ranlib.exe libsmtclyrics_core.a
